ab: muci su nanu musa tatak?
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: qmuzyut saku glgan musa tatak.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: mha nanu musa byo’ing qu hiya?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: hkangi musa byo’ing qu hiya.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: mha su nanu musa phongxu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: gluw saku kululaka musa.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: muci su nanu musa phongxu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: gluw saku qasu musa phongxu.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.

ab: mgluw su nanu musa ngasal?
en: How do you go home?

ab: lgluw saku ceyun musa ngasal.
en: I go home by MRT.

ab: Lawa ga wal mluw glgan musa pqwasan?
en: How does lawa  go to school?

ab: Lawa ga wal mluw kisya musa pqwasan.
en: lawa goes to school by train.

ab: Sayun ga wal mluw nanu musa kyokay?
en: How does Sayun go to church?

ab: Watan ga wal mluw zitensya musa kyokay.
en: watan goes to church by bicycle.

ab: isu ga mluw su ceyun musa pqwasan?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: kun ga mluw saku basu.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: isu ga mluw zitensya musa pqwasan ga?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: aw, mluw saku zitensya musa pqwasan.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: mluw su Ceyun musa takaw?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: mluw saku kawthe musa Takaw.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: musa su tayto ga mluw su kisya ini ga mluw kululaka ga?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: mluw ku kululaka, mluw kululaka ru mluw kisya ga helaw qu kululaka hiya.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: musa su kyokay ga tama su basu ini ga qmuzit su glgan ga?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: qmuzit saku glgan ga helaw hazi qu tama basu hiya.
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: sobeh ngasal su bbiran qqaya?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: ini sobeh mtama saku otobay musa bbiran qqaya.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: sobeh yubinkyok qu pqwasan ga?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: sobeh balay hkangi kakay lga tehok la.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: nniqan nniqun ga sobeh ngan basu?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: htu ngan basu ru hkangi zmagan spung lga tehuk la.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
